ddls:
CREATE TABLE "affiliate_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each affiliate link */,
  "link_code" TEXT /* HTML code for the affiliate link */,
  "advertiser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advertiser who created the link */,
  "link_name" TEXT /* Name of the affiliate link */,
  "retail_price" REAL /* Retail price of the course associated with the link */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the course belongs to */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course associated with the link */,
  "link_status" TEXT /* Status of the affiliate link (e.g., active, inactive, expired) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the link was created */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the link expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_affiliate_links_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_affiliate_links_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_affiliate_links_advertiser_id FOREIGN KEY ("advertiser_id") REFERENCES advertisers ("advertiser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advertisers" (
  "advertiser_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advertiser */,
  "advertiser_name" TEXT /* Name of the advertiser */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the advertiser */,
  "affiliate_network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the affiliate network the advertiser belongs to */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* Company website of the advertiser */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the advertiser */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the advertiser */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the advertiser (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advertiser_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advertisers_affiliate_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("affiliate_network_id") REFERENCES affiliate_networks ("affiliate_network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "affiliate_networks" (
  "affiliate_network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each affiliate network */,
  "network_name" TEXT /* Name of the affiliate network */,
  "tracking_url" TEXT /* URL used for tracking affiliate link performance */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the affiliate network */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the affiliate network */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the affiliate network (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("affiliate_network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the category (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the course belongs to */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "enrollment_count" INTEGER /* Number of enrollments for the course */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the course (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the instructor */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the instructor's profile picture */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the instructor (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clicks" (
  "click_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each click event */,
  "link_id" INTEGER /* ID of the affiliate link clicked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who clicked the link */,
  "click_date" TEXT /* Date when the link was clicked */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to click the link */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who clicked the link */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the device used to click the link */,
  "geolocation" TEXT /* Geolocation data (e.g., city, country) of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("click_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clicks_link_id FOREIGN KEY ("link_id") REFERENCES affiliate_links ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clicks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device used by the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Last activity date of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system of the device */,
  "browser" TEXT /* Browser used on the device */,
  "screen_resolution" TEXT /* Screen resolution of the device */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion event */,
  "link_id" INTEGER /* ID of the affiliate link that led to the conversion */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who converted */,
  "conversion_date" TEXT /* Date when the conversion occurred */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated from the conversion */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "order_number" TEXT /* Order number associated with the conversion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversions_link_id FOREIGN KEY ("link_id") REFERENCES affiliate_links ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commission_rates" (
  "commission_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commission rate */,
  "link_id" INTEGER /* ID of the affiliate link the rate applies to */,
  "rate" REAL /* Commission rate percentage */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date for the commission rate */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date for the commission rate */,
  "minimum_payout" REAL /* Minimum payout threshold for the commission rate */,
  "payout_frequency" TEXT /* Payout frequency (e.g., weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commission_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commission_rates_link_id FOREIGN KEY ("link_id") REFERENCES affiliate_links ("link_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "advertiser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advertiser receiving the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., bank transfer, PayPal) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_advertiser_id FOREIGN KEY ("advertiser_id") REFERENCES advertisers ("advertiser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "link_id" INTEGER /* ID of the affiliate link the report is for */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks on the link */,
  "conversions" INTEGER /* Number of conversions from the link */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated from the link */,
  "click_through_rate" REAL /* Click-through rate (CTR) */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_link_id FOREIGN KEY ("link_id") REFERENCES affiliate_links ("link_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who enrolled */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the user enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the user enrolled */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course that was rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text provided by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_ratings_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
